import{createSlice}from"@reduxjs/toolkit";var initialState={currentVideo:null,loading:false,error:false};export var videoSlice=createSlice({name:"video",initialState:initialState,reducers:{fetchStart:function fetchStart(state){state.loading=true;},fetchSuccess:function fetchSuccess(state,action){state.loading=false;state.currentVideo=action.payload;},fetchFailure:function fetchFailure(state){state.loading=false;state.loading=true;},like:function like(state,action){//if trong mang like k chứa id ms làm
if(!state.currentVideo.likes.includes(action.payload)){//thêm id ng like vào
state.currentVideo.likes.push(action.payload);//tìm trong mảng dislike xem có chưa;; if có  thì gỡ ra
var userId=state.currentVideo.dislikes.findIndex(function(userId){return userId===action.payload;});state.currentVideo.dislikes.splice(userId,1);}},dislike:function dislike(state,action){//if trong mang like k chứa id ms làm
if(!state.currentVideo.dislikes.includes(action.payload)){//thêm id ng like vào
state.currentVideo.dislikes.push(action.payload);//tìm trong mảng dislike xem có chưa;; if có  thì gỡ ra
var userId=state.currentVideo.likes.findIndex(function(userId){return userId===action.payload;});state.currentVideo.likes.splice(userId,1);}}},extraReducers:{}});var _videoSlice$actions=videoSlice.actions,fetchStart=_videoSlice$actions.fetchStart,fetchSuccess=_videoSlice$actions.fetchSuccess,fetchFailure=_videoSlice$actions.fetchFailure,like=_videoSlice$actions.like,dislike=_videoSlice$actions.dislike;export{fetchStart,fetchSuccess,fetchFailure,like,dislike};export default videoSlice.reducer;
